title: Cobblemon: Sunstone Island
description: Welcome to the official Sunstone Island mod pack. Built to enjoy the newest updated version of Cobblemon with a handful of decorative and explorative mods, data, resource, and shader packs handpicked for the best Single player Cobblemon experience.
body:
Welcome to the official Sunstone Island mod pack. Built to enjoy the newest updated version of Cobblemon, handpicked for the best Single player Cobblemon/Create experience.

**Features:**

✔️Decorative, low-tech, and explorative mods

✔️BetterEnd, Better Combat, Better Third Person 

✔️QOL mods such as Waystones, Tiny Coal, Bartering Station

✔️Overhauled World Generation with Seasons, Terralith, and TerraBlender

✔️Create, Crafts & Additions, Slice & Dice, Track Map, Extended Cogwheels, Steam 'n' Rails

✔️Over 490+ Mods!

✔️Data packs such as Extraeeveelutions, Lucario Overhaul

✔️Resource packs such as Serified Font, Slighty Improved Font, FreshAnimations

✔️Shader pack ComplementaryRemimagined (not enabled by default) - Recommended shader pack.

**Multiplayer Experience**

Sunstone Island Server features:

Player Gyms, additional modeled Cobblemon, and so much more!

**Permission and Credits**

**MODS**

Tiny Cola is made by **[AzureDoomC](https://www.curseforge.com/members/azuredoomc/projects)** ~ Tiny Coal (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tiny-coal)
